notes:
Low-end mono laser. 1200 ProRes, 18ppm, available as USB-only, with integrated network interface ("n" version) or with WLAN interface ("nw"). PCL 5e and ZjStream.

For basic printing functionality use the "foo2zjs" driver. For advanced functionality such as printer status and maintenance features, use the HPLIP framework as CUPS backend and "foo2zjs" as printer driver.

Note that "foo2zjs" makes the printer printing much faster and more reliable than HPIJS, and it has a 1200x600-dpi mode wereas HPIJS (and other drivers for PCL 5e) have a maximum resolution of 600x600 dpi.

Consumables/Refills: Cartridge containing toner and imaging drum

drivers.name: foo2zjs-z1
drivers.comments:
This driver is available in the Ghostscript Printer Application

This driver will also work for the HP LaserJet 1018, 1020, 1022, P2035, and other Zenographics-based printers.

PPD files (and the Foomatic XML files to generate them) come with the driver, therefore we do not supply PPDs here on the OpenPrinting site.
